requirements.desc: flow-plan draft rule mandates Choice Format for every user question with no exceptions
requirements.note: SKILL.md line changed from 'Use selection-based questions as default' to 'MUST: Every question to the user … MUST use the Choice Format. No free-form questions. No exceptions.'

requirements.desc: confirmation questions after applying user-requested changes must also use Choice Format
requirements.note: The new SKILL.md wording explicitly includes 'including confirmations after applying user-requested changes' in the same MUST clause

requirements.desc: unit tests must fail if strict no-free-form/no-exceptions wording is removed
requirements.note: Two assertions added to skills-include.test.js: one for 'including confirmations after applying user-requested changes' and one for 'No free-form questions. No exceptions.' — removing either phrase from SKILL.md will cause these assertions to fail

unplanned.change: Overview paragraph reworded, {{/text}} closing tag removed, directory layout expanded with full presets/ subtree, table row for src/presets added, Shared Libraries table replaced with a single-row partial table and duplicate {{text}} directive structure introduced
New SDD flow artifact (draft phase output) — workflow scaffolding, not a product change
New SDD flow state file tracking step/requirement status and metrics — workflow scaffolding
New SDD issue-log artifact recording flow execution incidents — workflow scaffolding
New SDD Q&A clarification template artifact — workflow scaffolding
New code review artifact with three proposals (two APPROVED, one REJECTED regarding test brittleness) — workflow scaffolding
New formal feature specification document — workflow scaffolding
New test documentation file explaining what was tested and how to run — workflow scaffolding
New test design document with 14 test cases (TC-1 through TC-14) covering unit, integration, and acceptance levels — workflow scaffolding, not executed tests

summary.notes: All three requirements are fully satisfied by the two-file change (SKILL.md wording update + skills-include.test.js assertions). The specs/ additions are expected SDD workflow artifacts and do not affect product behavior. The docs/project_structure.md change is unplanned and introduces a structural defect: the first {{text}} directive is left unclosed ({{/text}} removed) and the Shared Libraries {{text}} block lacks a closing tag — this matches the APPROVED proposals in review.md but those fixes were not applied before finalize.
